lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: You must be the hero who seeks to find the sword?

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Yes. I am a talking cat

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: And you're a naked primate in an armor

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Well the game is still in the Alpha version, so I think it's impossible for you to find the sword

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Ola! Eu sou um NPC completamente normal.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Ele sorri de um jeito que nao parece natural.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Nao sou um mimico. Isso seria absurdo.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Seus olhos nao piscam. Nenhuma vez.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Por favor, continue andando.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: My ship crashes in this place, I'm trying to find its parts

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: But I think they landed on a part of the map that isn't available in the alpha version.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Work hard and you'll find the sword you're looking for

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: I used an ax to cut uranium, but you can cut other things with it

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: You must be the warrior Zero!

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: I was on a journey to find the perfect place to do a painting.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: But these bushes are getting in the way.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Chegou em boa hora. Tenho ofertas irrelevantes e insistentes.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Ele abre a mochila, mas so ha recibos amassados.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Nada em estoque. Mas posso anotar seu interesse.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Volte amanha. Ou ontem. Minha agenda e flexivel.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: You are not a hero.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Sorry for my manners, it's just that I'm sad.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: I lost my inspiration to write poems.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Imagine a poet who doesn't write poems, I totally lost my identity.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Maybe one day I can get back to writing poems.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: You know that writing poems doesn't make any money.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: You can make money being a hero?

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Ah, the chosen one. I felt your steps ripple through the weave of fate.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: I could conjure the sword you seek... but my spellbook only compiles in the full release.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Press on, hero. And beware the mages who would rather cast than converse.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Nihilist knight! Do you accept a game of chess for your soul?

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: You died but you haven't reached the end of your journey

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Thanks for playing the Alpha version of the game!

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Submit your feedback
